rationale: Existing corporation name at top — subject of the amendment.

label_verbatim: FIRST: The amendment was adopted on (date)
rationale: Date the amendment was adopted by the corporation.
Exhibit letter referencing the full text of the amendment (per 13-C MRSA §121.10.E).

label_verbatim: FIRST: duly approved as follows ('X' one box only) — by incorporators / by directors / by shareholders
rationale: Page-null radio backing the 3-option approval-method group. Enum: 'incorporators' | 'board_of_directors' | 'shareholders'.

label_verbatim: SECOND: Benefit Corporation status change ('X' one)
rationale: Page-null radio for the 3-option benefit-corporation group. Enum: 'become' | 'modify_public_benefit' | 'terminate'.

label_verbatim: SECOND: ...specific public benefit ... as set forth in Exhibit __
rationale: Inline exhibit letter for the modified public-benefit description (only when amendment.benefit_corp_change = 'modify_public_benefit').

label_verbatim: THIRD: ...are set forth in Exhibit __, or as follows

rationale: Inline alternative to exhibit — short prose stating share-exchange provisions.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: The effective date of the amendment (if other than the date of filing) is ___
rationale: Optional delayed effective date; if blank, effective on date of filing.
